NEW at Chico Electric

Eagle Scan Optical Electronic Walnut Color Sorter systems match and bolt to your existing sorter table for a clean and quick refit. Install and on-demand season long service optimize results and returns.

Learn More

View our most innovative product: microturbines deliver distributed power applications to reduce energy costs and increase power quality.

Latest Projects

Chico Electric recently installed microturbines at Sierra Nevada Brewing Co., to increase energy efficiency and generate on-site electrical and thermal energy.

Read More

–

Butte College in California is the first college in the history of the United States to go 'grid positive - generating enough electricity to offset their electricity costs.

Read More

–

Chico Electric installed new generators for the City of Chico. These reliable back up generators provide power with minimal maintenance for many years.

Read More

Call us for Residential and Commercial electrical and solar service and installation.   Contact

Call for Residential or Commercial Service

  • 24/7 Service
    Chico Electric is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.  
  • Lighting + Design
    Inspired to change the lighting in your home? Give us a call!
  • Code Corrections
    Have you received a “Notice To Comply”? We can help!  
  • Upgrades
    Upgrade your systems to match the new technology in your home/office.
  • House Fans
    From ceiling fans to whole house fans, we install them all.  
  • View All Services
    Click here to view all of Chico Electric Residential Electrical services.

Chico Electric is a member of these industry organizations:

About Us

A Northern California Electrical Contractor Since 1960

A recognized leader in electrical contracting, photovoltaic (PV) solar systems planning, engineering, and installation, Chico Electric has implemented PV Solar for customers in agriculture, food processing, manufacturing and education. Installations include industry leading projects, such as Sierra Nevada Brewing Company, one of the largest roof-top PV Solar installations in the nation and Butte Community College, the first college in the nation to achieve grid-positive solar generation

View projects
